title: Tolumnia × ann-hadderae
taxonomy: Tolumnia × ann-hadderae is a hybrid species within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is a cross between the species Tolumnia variegata and Tolumnia candida. This hybrid is part of the genus Tolumnia, which is primarily found in the Caribbean and Central America. Tolumnia × ann-hadderae is a relatively rare orchid species and is often sought after by collectors. The classification of Tolumnia × ann-hadderae reflects its unique ancestry and characteristics.
